name: Climbing
overview: Climbing is not a sport that requires tremendous muscular strength, it demands mental toughness and the willingness to practice hard to master a set of skills. The adventure of climbing can also provide a new way to enjoy the outdoors.

content.value: Do the following:

sub_requirements.label: a
sub_requirements.text: Explain to your counselor the most likely hazards you may encounter while participating in climbing and rappelling activities and what you should do to anticipate, help prevent, mitigate, and respond to these hazards.

content.value: Explain to your counselor the most likely hazards you may encounter while participating in climbing and rappelling activities and what you should do to anticipate, help prevent, mitigate, and respond to these hazards.

sub_requirements.label: b
sub_requirements.text: Show that you know first aid for and how to prevent injuries or illnesses that could occur during climbing activities, including heat and cold reactions, dehydration, stopped breathing, sprains, abrasions, fractures, rope burns, blisters, snakebite, concussions, and insect bites or stings.

content.value: Show that you know first aid for and how to prevent injuries or illnesses that could occur during climbing activities, including heat and cold reactions, dehydration, stopped breathing, sprains, abrasions, fractures, rope burns, blisters, snakebite, concussions, and insect bites or stings.

sub_requirements.label: c
sub_requirements.text: Identify the conditions that must exist before performing CPR on a person.

content.value: Identify the conditions that must exist before performing CPR on a person.

requirements.text: Learn the Leave No Trace Seven Principles and the Outdoor Code and explain what they mean.

content.value: Learn the Leave No Trace Seven Principles and the Outdoor Code and explain what they mean.

requirements.text: Present yourself properly dressed for belaying, climbing, and rappelling. Explain why you are wearing each piece of gear and discuss qualities of easy movement, entanglement free and good weather protection and comfort.

content.value: Present yourself properly dressed for belaying, climbing, and rappelling. Explain why you are wearing each piece of gear and discuss qualities of easy movement, entanglement free and good weather protection and comfort.
Do the following:

sub_requirements.label: a
sub_requirements.text: Explain how the difficulty of climbs is classified, and apply classifications to the rock faces or walls where you will demonstrate your climbing skills.

content.value: Explain how the difficulty of climbs is classified, and apply classifications to the rock faces or walls where you will demonstrate your climbing skills.

sub_requirements.label: b
sub_requirements.text: Explain the following: top-rope climbing, lead climbing, and bouldering.

content.value: Explain the following: top-rope climbing, lead climbing, and bouldering.

sub_requirements.label: c
sub_requirements.text: Evaluate the safety of a particular climbing area. Consider weather, visibility, the condition of the climbing surface, and any other environmental hazards.

content.value: Evaluate the safety of a particular climbing area. Consider weather, visibility, the condition of the climbing surface, and any other environmental hazards.

sub_requirements.label: d
sub_requirements.text: Determine how to summon aid to the climbing area in case of an emergency. Discuss what medical training is needed for your group when climbing and rappelling in remote areas.

content.value: Determine how to summon aid to the climbing area in case of an emergency. Discuss what medical training is needed for your group when climbing and rappelling in remote areas.

requirements.text: Verbal signals. Explain the importance of using verbal signals during every climb and rappel, and while bouldering. With the help of the counselor or another Scout, demonstrate the verbal signals used by each of the following:

content.value: Explain the importance of using verbal signals during every climb and rappel, and while bouldering. With the help of the counselor or another Scout, demonstrate the verbal signals used by each of the following:

sub_requirements.label: a
sub_requirements.text: Climbers

content.value: Climbers

sub_requirements.label: b
sub_requirements.text: Rappellers

content.value: Rappellers

sub_requirements.label: c
sub_requirements.text: Belayers

content.value: Belayers

sub_requirements.label: d
sub_requirements.text: Boulderers and their spotters

content.value: Boulderers and their spotters
Do the following:

sub_requirements.label: a
sub_requirements.text: Describe the kinds of rope acceptable for use in climbing and rappelling.

content.value: Describe the kinds of rope acceptable for use in climbing and rappelling.

sub_requirements.label: b
sub_requirements.text: Show how to examine a rope for signs of wear or damage.

content.value: Show how to examine a rope for signs of wear or damage.

sub_requirements.label: c
sub_requirements.text: Discuss ways to prevent a rope from being damaged.

content.value: Discuss ways to prevent a rope from being damaged.

sub_requirements.label: d
sub_requirements.text: Explain when and how a rope should be retired.

content.value: Explain when and how a rope should be retired.

sub_requirements.label: e
sub_requirements.text: Properly coil a rope.

content.value: Properly coil a rope.

requirements.text: Knots. Demonstrate the ability to tie each of the following knots. Give at least one example of how each knot is used in belaying, climbing, or rappelling.

content.value: Demonstrate the ability to tie each of the following knots. Give at least one example of how each knot is used in belaying, climbing, or rappelling.

sub_requirements.label: a
sub_requirements.text: Figure eight on a bight

content.value: Figure eight on a bight

sub_requirements.label: b
sub_requirements.text: Figure eight follow-through

content.value: Figure eight follow-through

sub_requirements.label: c
sub_requirements.text: Water knot

content.value: Water knot

sub_requirements.label: d
sub_requirements.text: Double fisherman's knot (grapevine knot)

content.value: Double fisherman's knot (grapevine knot)

sub_requirements.label: e
sub_requirements.text: Prusik hitch applied to rope

content.value: Prusik hitch applied to rope

requirements.text: Harness, Helmet & Gloves. Explain the purpose of each of the following and demonstrate how to put them on correctly.

content.value: Explain the purpose of each of the following and demonstrate how to put them on correctly.

sub_requirements.label: a
sub_requirements.text: Commercially made climbing harness

content.value: Commercially made climbing harness

sub_requirements.label: b
sub_requirements.text: Climbing helmet

content.value: Climbing helmet

sub_requirements.label: c
sub_requirements.text: Climbing or rappelling gloves

content.value: Climbing or rappelling gloves

requirements.text: Identify the elements of the CHECK system and describe the meaning of each one to your counselor.

content.value: Identify the elements of the CHECK system and describe the meaning of each one to your counselor.
Do the following:

sub_requirements.label: a
sub_requirements.text: Explain the importance of belaying climbers and rappellers and when it is necessary.

content.value: Explain the importance of belaying climbers and rappellers and when it is necessary.

sub_requirements.label: b
sub_requirements.text: Belay three different climbers on three different routes.

content.value: Belay three different climbers on three different routes.

sub_requirements.label: c
sub_requirements.text: Serve as a backup belayer on three different climbs.

content.value: Serve as a backup belayer on three different climbs.

sub_requirements.label: d
sub_requirements.text: Belay three different rappellers on three different routes.

content.value: Belay three different rappellers on three different routes.

sub_requirements.label: e
sub_requirements.text: Serve as a backup belayer on three different rappels.

content.value: Serve as a backup belayer on three different rappels.
Do the following:

sub_requirements.label: a
sub_requirements.text: Show the correct way to directly tie a belay rope to your harness.

content.value: Show the correct way to directly tie a belay rope to your harness.

sub_requirements.label: b
sub_requirements.text: Climb at least three different routes on a rock face or climbing wall, demonstrating good technique and using verbal signals with a belayer.

content.value: Climb at least three different routes on a rock face or climbing wall, demonstrating good technique and using verbal signals with a belayer.
Do the following:

sub_requirements.label: a
sub_requirements.text: Show the correct way to directly tie a belay rope to your harness.

content.value: Show the correct way to directly tie a belay rope to your harness.

sub_requirements.label: b
sub_requirements.text: Using a carabiner and a rappel device, attach a rappel rope to your harness.

content.value: Using a carabiner and a rappel device, attach a rappel rope to your harness.

sub_requirements.label: c
sub_requirements.text: Rappel down three different rock faces or three rappel routes on a climbing wall. Use verbal signals to communicate with a belayer, and demonstrate good rappelling technique.

content.value: Rappel down three different rock faces or three rappel routes on a climbing wall. Use verbal signals to communicate with a belayer, and demonstrate good rappelling technique.

requirements.text: Demonstrate ways to store rope, hardware, and other gear used for climbing, rappelling, and belaying.

content.value: Demonstrate ways to store rope, hardware, and other gear used for climbing, rappelling, and belaying.
